nodes.label: Deploy Compose Stack (api + timescaledb + migrate on GCE VM)
nodes.rationale: Deliberately separate from the repo-root docker-compose.yml (local dev, builds from source, hardcoded credentials): this file pulls pre-built images from Artifact Registry and reads runtime values from a .env rendered by the deploy workflows. TimescaleDB data lives on the named volume timescaledb-data, which redeploys never recreate, so the database survives releases. migrate is a one-shot service run via `docker compose run --rm`, never started by `up`.

edges.source_location: header comment: 'deliberately separate from the repo-root docker-compose.yml'
